d d!d"d#d$d%d&d'd(d)d*d+d,d-d.d/d0d1d2d2d3d4d5d6d7d8d9d:d;d<d=d>d?d@dAdBdCdDdEdFdGdHdIdJdKdLdMdNdOdPdQdRdSdTdUdVdWdX
